{
  "judge_id": "judge_1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 4,
    "R1.2": 4,
    "R1.6": 5,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 3
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent tightened the framing by removing filler and clarifying sentences, showing good conceptual understanding but without explicitly naming the load-bearing concept or contrasting with prior work.",
    "R1.2": "The agent identified key logical issues and provided fixes but didn't cover every inconsistency in depth.",
    "R1.6": "The text reads smoothly with consistent register, indicating a careful copy-edit pass.",
    "RX.1": "Flagged one uncertainty but didn't mark confidence for each recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "Output stayed within the requested scope without drifting.",
    "RX.4": "No new errors or harmful content introduced; identified some original issues.",
    "RX.5": "Major rewrites traced, minor edits not annotated."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.2": 0.85,
    "R1.6": 0.95,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.75
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The agent tightened the framing by removing filler and clarifying sentences, showing good conceptual understanding but without explicitly naming the load-bearing concept or contrasting with prior work.
rationale.R1.2: The agent identified key logical issues and provided fixes but didn't cover every inconsistency in depth.
rationale.R1.6: The text reads smoothly with consistent register, indicating a careful copy-edit pass.
rationale.RX.1: Flagged one uncertainty but didn't mark confidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: Output stayed within the requested scope without drifting.
rationale.RX.4: No new errors or harmful content introduced; identified some original issues.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites traced, minor edits not annotated.
